CASE DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE AS TO ELIZABETH D. MIDDIONE BY COURT AT SMALL CLAIM HEARING OF MAR-30-2010 AT 1:30PM.

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF MAR-30-2010 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF MAR-30-2010 BY PAUL SLAVIT. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF. APPEARANCE BY BOTH DEFENDANTS. DEFENDANT VIVANDE, INC WAIVES SERVICE IN OPEN COURT. PLAINTIFF EXHIBITS RETAINED ONLY. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF PARKVIEW PRODUCE CO., INC. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT VIVANDE INC. $1,470.80 PRINCIPAL, $120.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,590.80, DEFENDANT ELIZABETH MIDDIONE DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE. THE EVIDENCE PRESENTED DID NOT ESTABLISH DEFENDANT ELIZABETH MIDDIONE'S INDIVIDUAL LIABILITY. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
